items.titleZh: Sign Emanuel Sharp 签约动向更新
items.summary: The Sacramento Kings signed Emanuel Sharp to a three-year, $6.35 million deal, sources told Michael Scotto of HoopsHype. The deal includes two fully guaranteed years for Sharp, who was the No. 45 pick in the 2026 draft. The Kings also signed Adam Flagler to a two-year deal. Flagler spent the last two years in Oklahoma City.

items.title: Mavericks Acquire Santi Aldama From Grizzlies For Protected 2030 Pick Via Warriors
items.originalTitle: Mavericks Acquire Santi Aldama From Grizzlies For Protected 2030 Pick Via Warriors
items.headlineZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama
items.titleZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama
items.summary: The Dallas Mavericks have acquired Santi Aldama from the Memphis Grizzlies for AJ Johnson, a protected 2030 first round pick via the Golden State Warriors and two future second round picks. The Mavericks also acquire the draft rights to Tarik Biberovic. Aldama appeared in 43 games with the Grizzlies last season, averaging 14.0 points, 6.7 rebounds and 2.9 assists in 27.9 minutes. Aldama signed a three-year, $52.5 million deal with the Grizzlies last offseason.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM / Yahoo Sports 报道，独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama，送出 AJ Johnson、一个来自勇士的受保护 2030 年首轮签、两个未来次轮签。
items.oneLineZh: 独行侠从灰熊得到 Santi Aldama

items.title: 76ers Acquire Jaylen Brown From Celtics For Paul George, Two First Round Picks
items.originalTitle: 76ers Acquire Jaylen Brown From Celtics For Paul George, Two First Round Picks
items.headlineZh: 费城 76 人从凯尔特人得到 Jaylen Brown
items.titleZh: 费城 76 人从凯尔特人得到 Jaylen Brown
items.summary: The Philadelphia 76ers have acquired Jaylen Brown from the Boston Celtics for Paul George, two first round picks and two second round picks. The Sixers are sending a 2028 first round pick that could convert from a first to a swap that is more favorable to the Celtics, a 2031 unprotected first rounder, the most favorable 2028 second rounder of the Golden State Warriors, Oklahoma City Thunder, Milwaukee Bucks plus the most favorable 2030 second rounder out of the Washington Wizards, Portland Trail Blazers and Phoenix Suns. The Celtics canvassed the NBA over the past week searching for an acceptable trade of Brown after their attempts to trade him to the Bucks for Giannis Antetokounmpo were unsuccessful. Shams Charania reported that he first received word of these discussions earlier on Wednesday. Brown appeared in 71 games during the 2025-26 season, averaging 28.7 points, 6.9 rebounds and 5.1 assists in 34.4 minutes as he led the Celtics to 56 wins in what was expected to be a gap year without Jayson Tatum and after trading away Kristaps Porzingis and Jrue Holiday. Brown is on a $57 million contract for the 2026-27 season followed by $61 million in 2027-28 and $64.9 million in 2028-29. Brown will become eligible for a a two-year, $141.8 million contract extension. George appeared in 37 games this season, averaging 17.3 points, 5.3 rebounds, 3.6 assists and 1.7 steals in 30.7 minutes. George shot 39.2 percent on three-pointers. George is owed $54.1 million in 2026-27 and has a player option for $56.6 million in 2027-28. The Sixers will enter next season with a core of Tyrese Maxey, Joel Embiid, VJ Edgecombe plus Brown. The Sixers also signed Dean Wade in free agency on Tuesday.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM / Yahoo Sports 报道，费城 76 人从凯尔特人得到 Jaylen Brown，送出 Paul George、两个首轮签、两个次轮签。
items.oneLineZh: 费城 76 人从凯尔特人得到 Jaylen Brown

items.title: NBA Cuts Dozens Of Jobs As League Shifts Focus To Global Growth
items.originalTitle: NBA Cuts Dozens Of Jobs As League Shifts Focus To Global Growth
items.headlineZh: NBA 裁员数十人，转向全球增长业务
items.titleZh: NBA 裁员数十人，转向全球增长业务
items.summary: The NBA eliminated dozens of jobs Wednesday as the league continues reallocating resources toward growth areas including NBA Europe and its expanding local television business. The layoffs come nine months after Commissioner Adam Silver reorganized the league office with an emphasis on global expansion and viewership. According to an internal memo from Silver obtained by Sports Business Journal, the cuts affect several business departments and support staff but will also lead to new strategic hires. "The changes today are a continuation of the strategy we announced in September which will enable us to invest further, including in new positions and hiring, in key growth areas such as local media, programming and technology, the WNBA and the creation of a new league in Europe," said Silver in the memo. "These new investments will best position us to achieve our key objectives, including a better understanding of our fans, improving the game and viewership, and driving global growth across our leagues." The timing follows the closing of final bids for NBA Europe franchises Tuesday and comes just nine days after Matt Volk began his newly created role as general manager of local media. Silver still needs to hire a chief executive for NBA Europe along with additional staff, many likely based in Europe, to help launch the new league. On the media side, 11 former Main Street Sports Group teams have yet to finalize local television deals with training camp less than three months away, pushing many toward streaming platforms or over-the-air options. Volk's department will oversee local media operations and work with teams to improve local broadcasts, a role expected to require additional staffing. The league is also planning a centralized hub for local broadcasts as early as the 2027-28 season, potentially housed by Google or YouTube, which could generate further hiring. Silver's memo noted that data and marketing departments were already consolidated under the Global Partnership and Media department in September, framing Wednesday's layoffs as the next step in that restructuring. He added that affected employees are being offered severance, health benefits and outplacement services.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，NBA 裁撤数十个岗位，并把资源重新分配到 NBA 欧洲、地方电视业务和全球增长等方向。
items.oneLineZh: NBA 裁员数十人，转向全球增长业务
items.displayTitle: NBA 裁员数十人，转向全球增长业务

items.originalTitle: Tobias Harris, Spurs Agree To Two-Year, $31M Deal
items.headlineZh: Tobias Harris 与马刺达成两年，3100 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Tobias Harris 与马刺达成两年，3100 万美元合同
items.summary: Tobias Harris and the San Antonio Spurs have agreed to a two-year, $31 million deal. Harris is represented by Torrel Harris . Harris averaged 13.3 points, 5.1 rebounds and 2.5 assists in 27.7 minutes across 63 games with the Pistons. The Spurs were looking to sign a forward in free agency and Harris gives them an option similar to Julian Champagnie. San Antonio will utilize their non-taxpayer midlevel exception on Harris and now be hard capped at the first apron. The Pistons already signed his probable replacement in John Collins on a three-year, $51 million contract .

items.titleZh: Jaxson Hayes 与爵士达成两年，1200 万美元合同
items.summary: Jaxson Hayes and the Utah Jazz have agreed to a two-year deal worth $12 million. The Jazz will have a team option for the 2027-28 season. Hayes leaves the Los Angeles Lakers following their sign-and-trade with the Utah Jazz for Walker Kessler. Hayes appeared in 66 games last season with the Lakers, averaging 7.5 points and 4.1 rebounds in 18.3 minutes. Hayes first joined the Lakers during the 2023-24 season. Hayes gives the Jazz extra depth at center behind Jusuf Nurkic.

items.title: Tobias Harris Expected To Leave Pistons, Could Sign With Spurs
items.originalTitle: Tobias Harris Expected To Leave Pistons, Could Sign With Spurs
items.headlineZh: Tobias Harris 可能离开活塞
items.titleZh: Tobias Harris 可能离开活塞
items.summary: Tobias Harris has had two productive seasons with the Detroit Pistons to help support the franchise's resurgence around Cade Cunningham, but he will likely exit in free agency this offseason. The Pistons already signed his probable replacement in John Collins on a three-year, $51 million contract . "They're going to lose Tobias Harris," said Brian Windhorst. Harris averaged 13.3 points, 5.1 rebounds and 2.5 assists in 27.7 minutes across 63 games with the Pistons. The San Antonio Spurs are looking to sign a forward in free agency and Harris could be an option on a shorter contract. "Tobias Harris has a chance to end up one San Antonio," added Windhorst.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Tobias Harris 预计可能离开活塞，并有机会加盟马刺。

items.title: Nuggets Reach Out To LeBron James In Free Agency
items.originalTitle: Nuggets Reach Out To LeBron James In Free Agency
items.headlineZh: 掘金在自由市场接触 LeBron James
items.titleZh: 掘金在自由市场接触 LeBron James
items.summary: The Denver Nuggets have reached out to express interest in signing LeBron James. James made the decision on Tuesday that he will explore his options in free agency and leave the Los Angeles Lakers after eight seasons with the franchise. The Nuggets tried to recruit James to the Nuggets in 2018 when he was a free agent and ultimately left the Cleveland Cavaliers for the Lakers. James has described Nuggets team president Josh Kroenke as a "very dear friend." The Nuggets would give James the opportunity to team up with Nikola Jokic. The Golden State Warriors, Cleveland Cavaliers and Miami Heat have been mentioned by ESPN as the three most probable destinations for James. But with James willing to take less money in free agency, the Nuggets open up as a possibility.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，掘金已经在自由市场接触 LeBron James。

items.titleZh: Jonathan Isaac 与魔术达成一年合同
items.summary: Jonathan Isaac and the Orlando Magic have agreed to a one-year deal. The Magic waived Isaac before the start of free agency and he still receive the $8 million he was guaranteed. Isaac never fully recovered from a series of injuries that kept him to playing just 45 games over four seasons from 2019-20 through 2022-23. This past season, the defensive-minded big man averaged 2.6 points and 2.5 rebounds in 10 minutes per game over 52 appearances. The Magic also signed Nikola Vucevic on the first full day of free agency. Isaac has been with the Magic since he was the sixth overall pick in the 2017 NBA draft.

items.summary: Quentin Grimes and the Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a four-year, $60 million deal with a player option for Year 4. Grimes played the 2025-26 season under the qualifying offer with the Philadelphia 76ers after he was unable to secure a long-term deal in restricted free agency. Grimes previously played alongside Luka Doncic with the Dallas Mavericks. In 75 games last season, Grimes averaged 13.4 points, 3.6 rebounds and 3.3 assists in 29.4 minutes for the Sixers. Grimes is represented by Austin Brown and Steven Heumann .

Mamukelashvili will effectively be the replacement for Rui Hachimura, who is expected to receive a more lucrative contract on the open market.

items.title: Walker Kessler From Jazz To Lakers In Four-Year, $130M Sign-And-Trade For Two FRPs, Two Swaps
items.originalTitle: Walker Kessler From Jazz To Lakers In Four-Year, $130M Sign-And-Trade For Two FRPs, Two Swaps
items.headlineZh: 湖人通过先签后换得到 Walker Kessler
items.titleZh: 湖人通过先签后换得到 Walker Kessler
items.summary: Walker Kessler has agreed to join the Los Angeles Lakers on a four-year, $130 million sign-and-trade that will send unprotected first round picks in 2031 and 2033 along with first round pick swaps in 2028 and 2030 to the Utah Jazz. The Jazz were expected to match any offer sheet Kessler signed in restricted free agency, which led to the negotiation of a sign-and-trade with Utah getting significant draft capital back in return. Utah offered a five-year, $150 million contract to Kessler. The Lakers entered the offseason with up to five tradeable first round picks and now only have one left with their 2032 swap available. Kessler appeared in just five games last season due to a torn labrum i his left shoulder in November. During the 2024-25 season, Kessler averaged 11.1 points, 12.2 rebounds, 1.7 assists and 2.4 blocks in 30.0 minutes across 58 games. Kessler was originally acquired by the Jazz in the 2022 Rudy Gobert trade as this further adds to Utah's draft haul originating from that deal with the Minnesota Timberwolves. The Jazz re-signed Jusuf Nurkic this offseason on a two-year, $22 million deal and will give the team depth at center. Kessler is represented by Aaron Mintz , Houston Kessler and Dave Spahn . The Lakers are now expected to reach agreements with Sandro Mamukelashvili and Quentin Grimes.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM / Yahoo Sports 报道，湖人从爵士通过四年 13000 万美元先签后换得到 Walker Kessler，送出两个首轮签、两次选秀权互换。
items.oneLineZh: 湖人通过先签后换得到 Walker Kessler

items.title: Mike Conley Jr., Celtics Agree To One-Year Deal
items.originalTitle: Mike Conley Jr., Celtics Agree To One-Year Deal
items.headlineZh: Mike Conley Jr. 与凯尔特人达成一年合同
items.titleZh: Mike Conley Jr. 与凯尔特人达成一年合同
items.summary: Mike Conley Jr. and the Boston Celtics have agreed to a one-year deal. Conley has spent the past three-plus seasons with the Minnesota Timberwolves. Last season, Conley averaged 4.5 points, 1.7 rebounds and 2.9 assists in 18.4 minutes. Conley will play a part time role with the Celtics behind Derrick White and Payton Pritchard, but is considered one of the NBA's best veteran leaders.
items.dekZh: 上赛季，Conley 场均4.5分，1.7篮板和2.9助攻，出场18.4分钟。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Mike Conley Jr. 与凯尔特人达成一年合同，原文关注 Mike Conley Jr 的合同或自由市场动向。
items.oneLineZh: Mike Conley Jr. 与凯尔特人达成一年合同
keyPoints: 上赛季，Conley场均4.5分，1.7篮板和2.9助攻，出场18.4分钟。
items.displayTitle: Mike Conley Jr. 与凯尔特人达成一年合同

items.title: Nikola Vucevic, Magic Agree To One-Year, $3.9M Deal
items.originalTitle: Nikola Vucevic, Magic Agree To One-Year, $3.9M Deal
items.headlineZh: Nikola Vucevic 与魔术达成一年，390 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Nikola Vucevic 与魔术达成一年，390 万美元合同
items.summary: Nikola Vucevic and the Orlando Magic have agreed to a one-year, $3.9 million deal. Vucevic was traded by the Philadelphia 76ers to the Magic in 2012 as part of the Dwight Howard trade and stayed there until his trade to the Chicago Bulls in 2021. Vucevic finished last season with the Boston Celtics.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Nikola Vucevic 与魔术达成一年，390 万美元合同，原文关注 Nikola Vucevic 的合同或自由市场动向。

items.displayTitle: Nikola Vucevic 与魔术达成一年，390 万美元合同

items.title: Ariel Hukporti, Sixers Agree To One-Year, $3.4M Deal
items.originalTitle: Ariel Hukporti, Sixers Agree To One-Year, $3.4M Deal
items.headlineZh: Ariel Hukporti 与 76 人达成一年，340 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Ariel Hukporti 与 76 人达成一年，340 万美元合同
items.summary: Ariel Hukporti and the Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to a one-year, $3.4 million deal. Hukporti spent the past two seasons with the New York Knicks. During the 2025-26 season, Hukporti averaged 2.2 points and 2.9 rebounds in 9.2 minutes over 54 games. Hukporti gives the Sixers extra depth at center behind Joel Embiid.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Ariel Hukporti 与 76 人达成一年，340 万美元合同，原文关注 Ariel Hukporti 的合同或自由市场动向。
items.oneLineZh: Ariel Hukporti 与 76 人达成一年，340 万美元合同
items.displayTitle: Ariel Hukporti 与 76 人达成一年，340 万美元合同

items.title: Norman Powell, Bulls Agree To Two-Year, $45M Contract
items.originalTitle: Norman Powell, Bulls Agree To Two-Year, $45M Contract
items.headlineZh: Norman Powell 与公牛达成两年，4500 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Norman Powell 与公牛达成两年，4500 万美元合同
items.summary: The Chicago Bulls and guard Norman Powell have agreed to a two-year, $45 million contract. This will use up most of Chicago's remaining cap space. Powell was a first-time All-Star for the Miami Heat last season. The 33-year-old shooting guard averaged 21.7 points, 3.5 rebounds, 2.5 assists and 1.1 steals per game. Powell shot 47% from the field, including 38% on three-pointers. Powell was traded to Miami ahead of last season from the LA Clippers. In addition to the Heat and Clippers, Powell has also played for the Toronto Raptors and Portland Trail Blazers in his 11-year NBA career.
items.dekZh: 芝加哥公牛与后卫 Norman Powell 达成两年，4500 万美元合同。
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，签约动态：Norman Powell，公牛 达成 两年，4500 万美元合同。
items.oneLineZh: Norman Powell 与公牛达成两年，4500 万美元合同
keyPoints: 芝加哥公牛与后卫 Norman Powell达成两年，4500万美元合同。
